summary: Comprehensive testing of Real Property Tax Administration System completed. Backend API endpoints working correctly with 100% success rate. Frontend authentication, dashboard, and most UI components functional. Critical overlay issue identified with sidebar toggle preventing normal user interaction.

ui_bugs.issue: Button not clickable due to sidebar overlay intercepting pointer events
ui_bugs.details: Sidebar z-index (40) higher than header z-index (30) causing overlay issues. Requires force=True clicks to work in testing.

integration_issues.issue: Navigation to Assessment, Payments, Reports, and Settings pages redirects to login despite authentication

passed_tests: Login page displays with professional design
Dashboard loads with all 4 KPI cards (Total Properties, Collected Tax, Pending Payments, Delinquent Accounts)
Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to login
Logout functionality redirects to login page
Global search input field is present and functional
Navigation to Properties page works correctly
Breadcrumb navigation displays on non-dashboard pages
Sidebar navigation menu displays all required items
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix sidebar toggle overlay issue (z-index problem) and investigate why navigation to Assessment, Payments, Reports, and Settings pages redirects to login despite valid authentication. Properties page navigation works correctly as a reference.
